verification.subject: Verify your CarNotea email address
verification.body: Thank you for signing up for CarNotea. Please click the link below to verify your email address.
verification.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.ignore: If you didn't create a CarNotea account, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your CarNotea password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your CarNotea account. Click the link below to choose a new password.
passwordReset.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password won't change.
